Flying [i](This creature can't be blocked except by creatures with flying or reach.)[/i]
Vigilance [i](Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]The sky rang with the cries of armored seraphs, and the darkness made a tactical retreat.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Target creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Untap it. If it's still tapped, repeat this process until the creature is untapped.
cards.flavor_text: [i]When darkness seemed to be smothering, the light gave him breath.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
As Numerophile enters, secretly choose and note a number from 1 to 5.
At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, that player chooses a number from 1 to 5 which they haven't chosen this way. If the noted number is chosen, reveal that number, sacrifice Numerophile, you draw that many cards and you lose that much life. Otherwise, that player loses life equal to the chosen number.
cards.notes:
Inspiration — Strange obsession, ancient alien, society/religion-specific numbers

Mechanical Uniqueness — Secretly choosing and guessing numbers

cards.rules_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card.
Draw two cards.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“Forget what you know, my child, and listen to my tale.”[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Choose one or both —
• Target creature loses flying until end of turn.
• Destroy target artifact or enchantment.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Whatever landed here is long gone, but its impact is treacherous still.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Target creature gets +X/+X until end of turn. If you cast this spell during your main phase, that creature also gains vigilance and trample until end of turn.

Flash
Whenever Static Breakdasher or another artifact or creature you control leaves the battlefield, Static Breakdasher deals 1 damage to each opponent.

[+2]: Put a loyalty counter on each other permanent you control with a loyalty ability.
[+1]: Until end of turn, target creature gains vigilance and gets +1/+1 for each loyalty counter on Gemma of the Ringed Court.
[-3]: Create a white enchantment token named Glittering Boon with “Creatures you control get +1/+1.”

cards.rules_text:
[+1]: Each player mills cards until they've milled two nonland cards this way. You lose 2 life.
[-2]: You may sacrifice a creature. If you do, destroy another target creature or planeswalker.
[-3]: Exile target card from a graveyard. You may cast that card for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any type to cast that spell.

cards.rules_text:
[+1]: Up to one target creature gets +1/+1 and gains first strike until end of turn.
[-2]: Until end of turn, whenever a creature you control attacks, it deals 1 damage to the player or planeswalker it's attacking.
[-6]: You get an emblem with “Whenever a creature enters under your control, it gets +3/+3 and gains haste until end of turn.”

cards.rules_text:
[+1]: You may have Bramblebark of the Gyre lose all types and become a 0/X Treefolk creature with hexproof and reach until your next turn, where X is its loyalty.
[-2]: Create a 1/3 green Treefolk creature token.
[-4]: You get an emblem with “Creatures you control get +0/+1 and assign combat damage equal to their toughness rather than their power.”

cards.rules_text:
[+1]: Tap up to one target permanent and put a stun counter on it.
[-2]: Mill six cards, then exile up to one target instant or sorcery card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost.
[-5]: Tap each creature your opponents control. Put two stun counters on each of them.
